name: Paradigm
bio: Paradigm, god of technology, was born during the Industrial Revolution and has only grown in power since. By the 21st century, very few remain who can challenge his influence.

Given that he isn't exactly a force for good, Aluccard suspects Paradigm may be behind the culling of immortal beings -- though he lacks the resources or strength to confront the tech titan alone. Their respective businesses are also in the middle of a hostile takeover, which does nothing to ease the tension between them.
